entry.title: [BE] Zohran: "I Support Israel"
entry.summary: Zohran Mamdani recently gave an interview where he gave an extremely sneaky answer to the question of whether he thinks Israel has a right to exist as a Jewish state. In this video I dissect this answer, explain how it's made to play both sides by letting the viewer interpret it how they want, and how this sort of rhetoric helps lead people to liberal Zionism. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
Zohran Mamdani recently gave an interview where he gave an extremely sneaky answer to the question of whether he thinks Israel has a right to exist as a Jewish state. In this video I dissect this answer, explain how it's made to play both sides by letting the viewer interpret it how they want, and how this sort of rhetoric helps lead people to liberal Zionism.
Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada
Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/
Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join

Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com
Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g

entry.title: [BE] Be Anti-Israel, Not Pro-Palestine
entry.summary: The 'pro-Palestine' label is too easy to misconstrue and abuse, compared to the 'anti-Israel' label, which gets right to the point and makes it a lot harder for dishonest actors to infiltrate the movement. In this video I explain why. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
The 'pro-Palestine' label is too easy to misconstrue and abuse, compared to the 'anti-Israel' label, which gets right to the point and makes it a lot harder for dishonest actors to infiltrate the movement. In this video I explain why.

entry.title: [BE] This IDF Officer Infiltrated the Palestine Movement
entry.summary: An IDF intelligence officer, Shaeil Ben-Ephraim, also known as "academic_la" successfully infiltrated the anti-Zionist movement. He has had the red carpet rolled out for him by many 'pro-Palestine' media figures, podcasts, etc. Now he is collecting the personal information of Palestinians in Gaza. Here I cover how ridiculous this is Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
An IDF intelligence officer, Shaeil Ben-Ephraim, also known as "academic_la" successfully infiltrated the anti-Zionist movement. He has had the red carpet rolled out for him by many 'pro-Palestine' media figures, podcasts, etc. Now he is collecting the personal information of Palestinians in Gaza. Here I cover how ridiculous this is

entry.title: [BE] The Myth of Ethiopian Israeli Sterilization & Victimhood
entry.summary: It's commonly claimed that Ethiopian Jews are sterilized in Israel. This is both not true and an actively harmful falsehood to spread, as the narrative that they are oppressed victims of Israel obfuscates the reality of Israeli Jewish supremacism & the relationship between the colonizer Zionists and their colonized Palestinian victims. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Subscribe to my Substack: https://ofpatmos.substack.com/ Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
It's commonly claimed that Ethiopian Jews are sterilized in Israel. This is both not true and an actively harmful falsehood to spread, as the narrative that they are oppressed victims of Israel obfuscates the reality of Israeli Jewish supremacism & the relationship between the colonizer Zionists and their colonized Palestinian victims.

entry.title: [BE] Why Don't Americans Fight?
entry.summary: People in the US are notably very passive when it comes to their country's crimes against others, but also, recently, they are even still quite passive in the face of a government that many of them consider to be outright fascist at home So what gives with the lack of action? Here I investigate. entry.content:
People in the US are notably very passive when it comes to their country's crimes against others, but also, recently, they are even still quite passive in the face of a government that many of them consider to be outright fascist at home So what gives with the lack of action? Here I investigate.

entry.title: [BE] Be Ruthless to People to Be Ruthless to Systems
entry.summary: "Be Kind to People, Be Ruthless to Systems" is a good mantra to follow if you want to ensure that nothing changes about those systems. In this video I discuss a harsh reality, which is that systems are upheld by people because they benefit certain groups of people, and change in the real world is not achieved by just being kind to those people until the systems fall. This quote might as well have been tailor made in a lab by capitalists to promote inaction. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
"Be Kind to People, Be Ruthless to Systems" is a good mantra to follow if you want to ensure that nothing changes about those systems. In this video I discuss a harsh reality, which is that systems are upheld by people because they benefit certain groups of people, and change in the real world is not achieved by just being kind to those people until the systems fall. This quote might as well have been tailor made in a lab by capitalists to promote inaction.

entry.title: [BE] Moving Past the Breadtube Era - Let's Focus On Stuff That Actually Exists
entry.summary: For many years, there was a hyperfocus on the spectre of literal Nazism rising once more across the West, despite it not being nearly as much of a real-world threat as was being claimed. At the same time, Israel was implementing something very close to Nazism. Here, I discuss this failure and make an appeal for us to do better, in the wake of the horrible Trash Discourse video where they go looking for secret Nazism among anti-Zionist creators. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/badempanada.com Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
entry.content:
For many years, there was a hyperfocus on the spectre of literal Nazism rising once more across the West, despite it not being nearly as much of a real-world threat as was being claimed. At the same time, Israel was implementing something very close to Nazism. Here, I discuss this failure and make an appeal for us to do better, in the wake of the horrible Trash Discourse video where they go looking for secret Nazism among anti-Zionist creators.

entry.title: [BE] Most Embarrassing Zionist Ever - Her Arguments Will Make You CRINGE
entry.summary:
This video covers one of the most emblematic examples of the pure idiocy of Zionist attempts to argue for their ideology that you will ever see. The Zionist streamer "Stardust" attempted to debunk Frogan stating the fact that Ethan Klein got the pro-Israel pressure organization the ADL involved to ban Twitch streamers by falsely accussing them of anti-semitism. Her attempt to debunk this might be the worst thing you will ever see, and it's emblematic of Zionist argumentation in general. Also, in the second half I go over how the H3H3 community made a list of "BadEmpanada ToS violations" to mass report, which are all just statements of fact, backed up by evidence, which they can't refute. Further proving my point about Zionists and their inability to argue. Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/BadEmpanada Become a BadEmpanada Live member: https://www.youtube.com/@BadEmpanadaLive/join Main Channel: https://youtube.com/BadEmpanada Follow my Instagram: https://instagram.com/BadEmpanada One-time donations: https://ko-fi.com/BadEmpanada Spanish Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCfqxvPxPVLuCzPeOsleOB3g
00:00 The Dumbest Zionist Ever - Streamer 'Stardust' 13:01 H3 Fans Mass Report Me For Stating Facts About Israel
entry.content:
This video covers one of the most emblematic examples of the pure idiocy of Zionist attempts to argue for their ideology that you will ever see. The Zionist streamer "Stardust" attempted to debunk Frogan stating the fact that Ethan Klein got the pro-Israel pressure organization the ADL involved to ban Twitch streamers by falsely accussing them of anti-semitism. Her attempt to debunk this might be the worst thing you will ever see, and it's emblematic of Zionist argumentation in general.
Also, in the second half I go over how the H3H3 community made a list of "BadEmpanada ToS violations" to mass report, which are all just statements of fact, backed up by evidence, which they can't refute. Further proving my point about Zionists and their inability to argue.

entry.title: [BE] Why Liberals Claim to Be Leftists
entry.summary: Natalie Wynn aka Contrapoints aka Natalie Clinton seems very worried about "The Left" always losing and "The Left" criticising her. She can't stop talking about this in her videos which come out three times per decade. Why does she do this, and why do others like her do the same? entry.content:
Benjamin Netanyahu and Yoav Gallant are the Anne Franks of our age. Don't look away #NeverAgainIsNow
